title: Fireside Chats – Free avalanche lecture on Tuesday nights
summary: 12/3 - Avalanche Rescue. Alaska Avalanche School classroom. 12/10 - Human Factors and Decision Making. Girdwood Ranger station. 12/17 - Snowpack and Mountain Weather. Alaska Avalanche School Classroom. All topics begin at 630 pm and will last about 90 minutes. Cost - Free!

title: CIRI seeks youth perspective on engaging next generation of shareholders
summary: SPC Youth Representative Sena Crow keeping up with her school work during SPC meeting breaks. Photo by Joel Irwin. At 16 years of age, Veronica Feldman has a busy life. Between rock climbing and trigonometry classes, she gives tours at the Evergreen Aviation and Space Museum in her hometown of McMinnville, Ore. She’s considering a summer intern...

title: Stock Will Prize Winner: Sept. 2013
summary: The winner of the September 2013 $200 Stock Will Participation Prize is Keith James Starforth. Shareholders will have one more opportunity to win an Apple iPad 3 in 2013, with a drawing conducted for the quarter ending December 31. title: Fireweed Business Center progress
summary: Construction crews prepare Fireweed Business Center site for winter shutdown. Photo by Joel Irwin. The late arrival of winter has allowed significant progress on the site work for the Fireweed Business Center in Anchorage. Deep utility installation was completed throughout the site and the old site...

title: A word from the president, November 2013
summary: The holiday season is upon us – a time to reflect on the many things in our lives we are fortunate to have such as family, close friendships and the time we spend together. I hope this newsletter finds you and your family well and with the opportunity to share the season together. It was wonderful to see many friends at the Alaska Feder...

title: Dividend Distributions, Fourth Quarter 2013
summary: Elders’ Settlement Trust payments The fourth quarter CIRI Elders’ Settlement Trust payment of $450 is scheduled for December 13. Original shareholders who are 65 years of age or older and who own at least one share of CIRI stock as of the distribution dates are eligible to receive the Elders Trust payments.
